rationale: Both notes indicate close theoretical overlap: the citing paper builds a game-theoretic signaling model with hidden firm cost types and separating/pooling outcomes, while the cited paper also models cost-type signaling with separating/pooling (and semiseparating) equilibria in price-image communication. Given this shared mechanism-level structure and direct DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.2005.42.3.302), the citation is plausibly a substantive theory/mechanism source rather than an obvious incidental mention.
